suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'coords' and 'updateAddressFromCoords'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [coords, updateAddressFromCoords]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a complex expression in the dependency array. Extract it to a separate variable so it can be statically checked.

Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
